title: Fix draft.resumeTitle i18n key displaying at first position

requirements.summary: Wrap 'draft.resumeTitle' i18n key with translation function t() to display translated value instead of raw key string
acceptanceCriteria: The text 'draft.resumeTitle' no longer appears as raw text in the UI
The translated value for 'draft.resumeTitle' displays correctly in both English and Hindi
The fix applies to all locations where this key is rendered

file_operations.description: Import the useLanguage hook to access the t() translation function, then wrap all occurrences of 'draft.resumeTitle' with t() to ensure the translated value is displayed instead of the raw key string. Review the AlertDialogTitle and any other locations where this key may be used as a string literal.

Search for any usage of 'draft.resumeTitle' string literal and wrap it with t() function from useLanguage hook if found. Ensure the translation function is properly imported and applied to display the localized text.

requirements.summary: Verify and add 'draft.resumeTitle' translation key to both en.ts and hi.ts translation files with appropriate values
acceptanceCriteria: Both translations provide appropriate localized text

file_operations.description: Check if the 'draft.resumeTitle' key exists in the draft section of the translations object. If missing, add it with the value 'Resume Your Survey' under the draft namespace to provide appropriate English translation.

Check if the 'draft.resumeTitle' key exists in the draft section of the translations object. If missing, add it with an appropriate Hindi translation (e.g., 'अपना सर्वेक्षण फिर से शुरू करें') under the draft namespace to match the English version.
